response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, enterprise frameworks like Spring, or IDE development — key requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only incidental Java exposure in past roles without evidence of deep JVM or IDE internals expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer education
Extensive experience with CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem expertise
Absence of IDE, language server, or JVM tooling project experience
Java skills listed but not demonstrated in meaningful enterprise contexts
